chapter_title.en: The Call to Prayer and the Establishment of Prayer and the Reward of the Muezzins

text: 870 - وَقَالَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «آخِرُ مَا فَارَقْتُ عَلَيْهِ حَبِيبَ قَلْبِي صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ أَنَّهُ قَالَ «يَا عَلِيُّ إِذَا صَلَّيْتَ فَصَلِّ صَلاَةَ أَضْعَفِ مَنْ خَلْفَكَ وَ لاَ تَتَّخِذَنَّ مُؤَذِّناً يَأْخُذُ عَلَى أَذَانِهِ أَجْراً».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.870 - Imam Ali (as) said:
"The last thing my beloved (the Prophet, peace and blessings be upon him and his family) said to me before parting was:
'O’ Ali, when you lead the prayer, lead it considering the weakest among those behind you. And do not appoint a mu'adhdhin who takes payment for his adhan.'"
